title: WATCH:  'Toy Story 5' stars join Disney's 'Cool Kids Summer'
full_text:
'Toy Story 5' stars join Disney's 'Cool Kids Summer'
Scarlett Spears and Mykal-Michelle Harris headed to Walt Disney World to check out the return of the "Cool Kids Summer" program, running May 26 through Sept. 8, 2026.
